title: Resolve LilyGO T-Beam bridge mapping
description: The lilygo_tbeam bridge fragment has no canonical Zephyr target. Validate the intended board generation and radio/GNSS wiring or explicitly retire it.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical target builds and reaches bridge runtime oracle, or approved retirement removes fragment and support claims.
notes: Commit: 8d3b5e650. Added RETIRED/FAIL comments to lilygo_tbeam.conf and .overlay referencing audit; updated firmware-board-capability-matrix.md to document retirement of bridge fragment (no canonical Zephyr target). Matches acceptance criteria for explicit retirement and removal of support claims. Parent 2u26 already closed with this classification.
close_reason: Retired stale bridge fragment with explicit FAIL comments and matrix update per audit. Acceptance criteria met via approved retirement.
